sn51.33:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, just as the river Ganges slants, slopes, and inclines towards the east, so too a bhikkhu who develops and cultivates the four bases for spiritual power slants, slopes, and inclines towards Nibbāna.
sn51.33:1.0.2: "It is in this way, bhikkhus, that a bhikkhusn.v.291develops and cultivates the four bases for spiritual power so that he slants, slopes, and inclines towards Nibbāna."
